extraction_reasoning: The litigation table distinguishes “By” from “Against” rows: the company has 1 criminal proceeding by it, which is excluded, and 0 criminal proceedings against it; tax proceedings against the company are 7, while statutory/regulatory proceedings against the company are shown as “-” (counted as 0). The subsidiaries, promoter, directors and group-company “Against” rows are all nil, so the quantified group amount is the company’s stated aggregate amount involved of ₹48.12 million, excluding all “By” matters; this converts to ₹4.812 crore at ₹10 million per crore. Contingent liabilities are taken from the explicitly stated consolidated “Total” of ₹98.38 million as of March 31, 2024, not re-summed, converting to ₹9.838 crore. The concentration figures are company-wide consolidated revenue from operations for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024: top five customers 32.46% and top ten customers 47.48%. The source currency unit for the litigation and contingent-liabilities tables is ₹ million; all crore fields are converted by dividing the stated million amounts by 10.
